name: Upside-Down Orange Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the last four ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
2. Spoon about 1 1/2 tablespoons of the orange mixture into each well oiled cup of a 6-cup muffin pan.
3. Make one recipe of biscuits according to instructions on the bag.
4. Place one biscuit in each muffin cup.
5. Bake at 400 degrees F for about 10 minutes.
6. Invert the pan onto a plate and serve warm.
